title: App Settings - General - Licenses - License Link (MIT,Apache2.0.....)
scenario: Verify that tapping each license link in App Settings > General > Licenses displays Source and License links, each opening a view with headline, description, and Cancel button, and that licenses also appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
steps: Tap each license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0).
Verify that each license displays two links: Source and License link.
Verify that the view shows a headline, description, and a Cancel button (X) in the upper right corner.
Confirm that the same licenses appear in the Acknowledgements section.
expected: Each license link displays Source and License links. Tapping a License link opens a view with a headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button. The same licenses are listed in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
